title: rosa × dumetorum f. rocheliana
intro: Rosa × dumetorum f. rocheliana, also known as the Rosa × dumetorum or Rochel's wild rose, is a subspecies of hybrid rose that combines the species Rosa canina and Rosa rubiginosa. The Rosa × dumetorum f. rocheliana has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and providing relief from menstrual cramps. Rosa × dumetorum f. rocheliana can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
